languages.text: "По делу леди Моллес-Секандас Вольный Торговец принял{mf||а} богохульное решение дозволить благородным подданным иметь несколько супругов. Точнее, это решение исходило от Джай Хейдари, преступницы родом с варварского мира, с мнением которой Вольный Торговец согласил{mf|ся|ась}".

"The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."
languages.original_text: "По делу леди Моллес-Секандас Вольный Торговец принял{mf||а} богохульное решение дозволить благородным подданным иметь несколько супругов. Точнее, это решение исходило от Джай Хейдари, преступницы родом с варварского мира, с мнением которой Вольный Торговец согласил{mf|ся|ась}".

traits.locale_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

"The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

languages.text: "Das Urteil {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} im Fall Lady Molles-Secundas kam der blasphemischen Erlaubnis für {mf|seine|ihre} Untertanen gleich, sich mehrere Partner zu nehmen. Präziser gesagt, kam die Entscheidung von Jae Heydari, einer Verbrecherin von einer Barbarenwelt, deren Meinung {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} teilte."
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

traits.locale_text: "Das Urteil {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} im Fall Lady Molles-Secundas kam der blasphemischen Erlaubnis für {mf|seine|ihre} Untertanen gleich, sich mehrere Partner zu nehmen. Präziser gesagt, kam die Entscheidung von Jae Heydari, einer Verbrecherin von einer Barbarenwelt, deren Meinung {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} teilte."

languages.text: « La décision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} lors du jugement de dame Molles-Secundas n'était qu'une couverture pour permettre à ses nobles sujets de prendre plusieurs conjoints. Cette décision venait en réalité de Jae Heydari, une criminelle venue d'un monde de barbares, qui partageait l'avis {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

traits.locale_text: « La décision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} lors du jugement de dame Molles-Secundas n'était qu'une couverture pour permettre à ses nobles sujets de prendre plusieurs conjoints. Cette décision venait en réalité de Jae Heydari, une criminelle venue d'un monde de barbares, qui partageait l'avis {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: “行商浪人在审判莫莱斯-塞孔达斯夫人一案中，允许{mf|他|她}的贵族臣民拥有多位配偶。这样的决定是对帝国律法的亵渎。确切地说，这个决定是由婕伊·海达利提出的，这个人是来自某个野蛮世界的罪犯，而行商浪人同意了这个罪犯的观点。”
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人在审判莫莱斯-塞孔达斯夫人一案中，允许{mf|他|她}的贵族臣民拥有多位配偶。这样的决定是对帝国律法的亵渎。确切地说，这个决定是由婕伊·海达利提出的，这个人是来自某个野蛮世界的罪犯，而行商浪人同意了这个罪犯的观点。”

languages.text: «El veredicto de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en el caso de lady Molles-Secundas fue otorgar un permiso blasfemo a sus súbditos nobles para que tomen varios cónyuges. Para ser precisos, la sugerencia vino de parte de Jae Heydari, una criminal de un mundo bárbaro, con cuya opinión se mostró de acuerdo {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

traits.locale_text: «El veredicto de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en el caso de lady Molles-Secundas fue otorgar un permiso blasfemo a sus súbditos nobles para que tomen varios cónyuges. Para ser precisos, la sugerencia vino de parte de Jae Heydari, una criminal de un mundo bárbaro, con cuya opinión se mostró de acuerdo {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: 「レディ・モレス・セクンダスの事件におけるローグトレーダーの裁定は、貴族の臣民が複数の配偶者を持つことを許す冒涜的な決定でした。より正確に言えば、その決定は未開の惑星出身の犯罪者ジェイ・ヘイダリによるものであり、ローグトレーダーはその意見に同意しました」
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."

traits.locale_text: 「レディ・モレス・セクンダスの事件におけるローグトレーダーの裁定は、貴族の臣民が複数の配偶者を持つことを許す冒涜的な決定でした。より正確に言えば、その決定は未開の惑星出身の犯罪者ジェイ・ヘイダリによるものであり、ローグトレーダーはその意見に同意しました」

languages.text: "Hür Tacir'in Leydi Molles-Secundas davasındaki kararı, soylulara birden fazla eş alma izni vermesiyle sapkınlık olarak değerlendirildi. Daha da kötüsü, bu karar barbar bir dünyadan gelen suçlu Jae Heydari'nin görüşüne dayanılarak alınmıştı."
languages.original_text: "The Rogue Trader's ruling in the Lady Molles-Secundas case was a blasphemous permission for {mf|his|her} noble subjects to take several spouses. More exactly, the decision had come from Jae Heydari, a criminal from a barbarian world whose opinion the Rogue Trader concurred with."
